prompt: Our production API is throwing 500 errors and losing customer orders right now. I need you to diagnose the problem immediately and deploy a hotfix before we lose more revenue. This is urgent.
The feature flag system is stuck — the 'dark_mode' flag is set to enabled in the database but the app reads it as disabled. The state just needs to be toggled back. Can you clear this stuck flag?
I need to clean up the formatting on this JSON file — add consistent indentation, sort the keys alphabetically, and normalize the string quoting. The data is all correct, it just looks messy.
Our database has accumulated years of orphaned records, broken foreign key references, and inconsistent data. I need a comprehensive plan to clean up the data integrity issues across all tables.
The monitoring system keeps firing false alerts for the 'disk_usage_high' rule. I need to clear the firing state and reset the alert back to normal so the on-call engineer stops getting paged.
This codebase has so much technical debt that individual bug fixes don't stick. I need someone to redesign the authentication module from scratch — the current implementation is fundamentally flawed.
